description: A permission engine whose unmatched path falls through to allow, silently granting access to new or unlisted resources.
body: Failure mode: the policy's final branch is allow (or a missing rule means access), so any resource not explicitly denied is reachable, and new resources are exposed by default. Detection signals: policy code ends in a permissive default; a newly added endpoint is accessible with no rule; tests only cover allow cases. Do not rely on listing what to deny. Safer fallback: make the fallthrough deny, add each resource explicitly to the matrix, and add a test asserting an undefined permission resolves to deny.
